evals.description: Strong homepage copy — total_score above 70, all dimensions scored

input.copy:
Stop chasing invoices. Get paid 3x faster.

FreshBooks automatically sends payment reminders, lets clients pay online in seconds, and gives you real-time cash flow visibility — so you spend less time on admin and more time doing the work you love.

Join 30 million small business owners who've already made accounting painless.

Start Your Free 30-Day Trial
No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
input.product_description: Accounting software for small businesses and freelancers

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
total_score is a number between 0 and 100
total_score is above 65 given the benefit-led, specific copy
score_band is one of 'strong', 'good', 'needs_work', 'weak', or 'poor'
copy_type is 'homepage'
word_count is a positive integer
timestamp is present in ISO8601 format
dimensions object contains value_proposition, headline, cta, passive_voice, readability, benefit_ratio, and filler_words fields
Each dimension has score, max_score, and issues array
dimensions.headline.primary_headline is a non-null string
dimensions.cta.primary_cta_text is a non-null string
dimensions.benefit_ratio.benefit_pct is a number between 0 and 1
dimensions.benefit_ratio.strongest_benefits is a non-empty array
dimensions.filler_words.top_offenders is an array
priority_fixes is an array of up to 3 entries sorted by points_available descending
Output contains no rewritten copy — analysis and fix directions only

evals.description: Weak copy with filler words and feature-focus — total_score below 50

input.copy: Our incredibly powerful and truly revolutionary platform leverages cutting-edge, state-of-the-art technology to seamlessly facilitate and streamline your workflow processes. The system is designed to be easily utilized by teams of any size. Features include real-time dashboard functionality, advanced reporting capabilities, and comprehensive integration support. Our world-class solution is absolutely the best choice for businesses looking to optimize their performance.

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
total_score is below 55 given the heavy filler word usage and feature-only copy
dimensions.filler_words.rate_per_100_words is greater than 2 (high filler density)
dimensions.filler_words.empty_superlatives is a non-empty array
dimensions.benefit_ratio.benefit_pct is below 0.4 (mostly feature statements)
dimensions.benefit_ratio.feature_statements_to_convert is a non-empty array
priority_fixes is a non-empty array

evals.description: Copy too short — returns structured error
assertions: Returns JSON with an error field
error value is 'copy_too_short' or similar
minimum_words field is present indicating the minimum requirement (30)
